**TEMPO frontier-orbital gap** — DFT, tier `standard` (B3LYP/def2-TZVP, exact four-center integrals) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 2. Geometry: single‐point on the user-supplied `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz` (no geometry optimization at DFT level). SCF converged in 12 cycles. No warnings reported.

Frontier‐orbital energies (Koopmans-style):
- HOMO (orbital 86) = –6.3375439 eV
- LUMO (orbital 87) = –2.4651235 eV
→ HOMO–LUMO gap = 3.8724203 eV

Command:
```
/home/erobles/chem-skills/mcp_server/chemkit_engine/cli.py frontier \
  /home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/tempo/tempo.xyz \
  --method dft --tier standard --charge 0 --mult 2 --stdout path \
  --out /home/erobles/chem-skills/.fidelity_scratch/tmprhkxc80k/live.json
```
